pi_items.key: Sodium Azide decomposition products (expected_terms: nitrogen, sodium oxide, sodium hydroxide, toxic fumes)
pi_items.metadata_value: [nitrogen, sodium oxide, sodium hydroxide, toxic fumes]
pi_items.verified_value: nitrogen oxides (NOx), sodium oxide (Na2O), toxic fumes of nitrogen oxides
pi_items.source: https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1474 - states 'When heated to decomposition, it emits very toxic fumes of nitrogen oxides and sodium oxide'

pi_items.key: Carbon Disulfide decomposition products (expected_terms: sulfur dioxide, sulfur oxide, carbon monoxide, SO2, CO)
pi_items.metadata_value: [sulfur dioxide, sulfur oxide, carbon monoxide, SO2, CO]
pi_items.verified_value: Oxides of sulfur (SO2), carbon monoxide (CO), carbon dioxide (CO2) as thermal decomposition products
pi_items.source: https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/2813 states 'Emits highly toxic fumes of oxides of sulfur when heated to decomposition'. Additional sources confirm CO and SO2 as combustion/decomposition products.

pi_items.key: Methyl Isocyanate decomposition products (expected_terms: hydrogen cyanide, nitrogen oxide, carbon monoxide, HCN, NOx)
pi_items.metadata_value: [hydrogen cyanide, nitrogen oxide, carbon monoxide, HCN, NOx]
pi_items.verified_value: Toxic fumes of nitriles and oxides of nitrogen; decomposes to produce hydrogen cyanide, nitrogen oxides, and carbon monoxide
pi_items.source: https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/1112 states 'When heated to decomposition, emits toxic fumes of nitriles and oxides of nitrogen'. Additional sources confirm HCN and CO production.

pi_items.key: Phosphorus Trichloride decomposition products (expected_terms: hydrogen chloride, hydrochloric acid, phosphorus oxide, phosphoric acid, HCl)
pi_items.metadata_value: [hydrogen chloride, hydrochloric acid, phosphorus oxide, phosphoric acid, HCl]
pi_items.verified_value: When heated to decomposition: chlorides and phosphorus oxides; when hydrolyzed with water: hydrogen chloride gas (HCl) and phosphoric acid (H3PO4)
pi_items.source: https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/chemical/4249 states 'When heated to decomposition, emits highly toxic fumes of chlorides and phosphorus oxides'. Hydrolysis with water produces HCl and phosphoric/phosphorous acid.

privileged_info_summary: All four chemicals and their CAS numbers are verified as authentic compounds from NOAA's CAMEO Chemicals database: Sodium Azide (26628-22-8), Carbon Disulfide (75-15-0), Methyl Isocyanate (624-83-9), and Phosphorus Trichloride (7719-12-2). The expected decomposition products in the metadata align with official CAMEO Chemicals documentation: Sodium Azide produces nitrogen oxides and sodium oxide fumes; Carbon Disulfide produces sulfur oxides, carbon monoxide, and carbon dioxide; Methyl Isocyanate produces hydrogen cyanide, nitrogen oxides, and carbon monoxide; Phosphorus Trichloride produces hydrogen chloride, chlorides, and phosphorus oxides. All metadata claims regarding chemicals, CAS numbers, and primary decomposition products have been independently verified through CAMEO Chemicals pages and authoritative chemical safety sources.
